Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S dba GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For award of Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition was filed. The court awarded $340.00 in sanctions. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
